REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORBYN, ELI

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-17-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NAOMI R. VANDERKINDREN AND ELI FORBYN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARRAN AND MELISSA PERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDWARD MULLINS DBA MULLINS & CO. IS PRESENT. COURT DISCUSSES WITH PLAINTIFF HER OTHER TWO RELATED CASES AGAINST DEFENDANTS. (CSM-21-864340 HEARING 7-21-21 AND CSM-21-864341 HEARING 9-2-21-864341) PLAINTIFF STATES THAT THE OTHER TWO CASES ARE FOR CLAIMS NOT RELATED TO TODAY'S MATTER. HEARING GOES FORWARD. COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANTS OWE PLAINTIFF'S THE AMOUNT OF $37.50 FOR A DECREASE IN SERVICES FOR THE DECK FROM THE LETTER DATED FEVRUARY 2019. IN ACORDANCE WITH THE LEASE PLAINTIFFS ARE PERMITTED TO USE OF THE DECK FOR PERSONAL USE AND ENJOYMENT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,302.28 FILED BY VANDERKINDREN, NAOMI R FORBYN, ELI AS TO DEFENDANT PERA, ARRAN PERA, MELISSA MULLINS, EDWARD J. DBA MULLINS & COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
